positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of celestial elements—a crescent moon, a cluster of shooting stars, a sleepy astronaut, and bioluminescent deep-sea coral—interacting within a cosmic nebula. The composition is balanced and centralized, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use a deep indigo, violet, and teal color palette accented by luminous gold and turquoise. The style should be a mix of vintage scientific blueprint etching and modern flat design, offering clean silhouettes and strong graphic contrast. Crisp lines, high contrast, vector art quality, emblem design.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, realistic, fuzzy, grainy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, solid colors only
